ham.subject: AWS CloudWatch Alert – High CPU Alert – order-processing – 3:52 PM
ham.body:
Dear DevOps Team,

AWS CloudWatch alerted us that the CPU Utilization for the 'order-processing' microservice exceeded the threshold at 15:42 UTC on 5 March 2026. Immediate investigation is advised.

Details:
• Instance ID: i-0abc123def456
• CPU Utilization: 92%
• Time: 15:37 – 15:45 UTC
• Region: us-east-1

Mitigation Steps:
1. Check recent pod deployments in EKS cluster.
2. Verify auto‑scaling group configurations.
3. If necessary, spin up a temporary worker node.

Please address this by 17:00 UTC. Let me know if you need additional logs.

Regards,
S.K. Patel
Cloud Operations Lead

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Your Card Locked Due to Fraud
spam.body:
Dear valued customer,

We regret to inform you that suspicious activity was detected on your Bank of Global Credit account. To protect your account, we have temporarily frozen your card pending verification. Failure to confirm identity within 24 hours will result in permanent account closure.

Immediate verification required: <URL>

Please log in with your name, date of birth and last 4 digits of SSN to confirm authenticity.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Bank of Global Credit – Fraud Prevention Team
